Alice Wang.abilityDescription: At the end of your opponent's turn, if their hand is larger than yours, they must discard until both hands are the same size.
Alice Wang.flavorText: Alice can often be found writing Math DUG emails---that is, until she opens Civ for the fourth time in a week.

Alumnae Hall.abilityDescription:
Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items (only when played after first turn).
Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

Analise Jia.atk1Description: 10 damage. You may put an Item card you played this turn into your hand.
Analise Jia.atk2Description: Your characters in play heal 30 damage. Remove 1 energy from this character.
Analise Jia.flavorText: If you sort AO3 by kudos, you'd see all of Analise's hypothetical fanfic at the top. One day, she'll actually write them.

Andrea C. R..atk1Description: Look at the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck. You may put one on the bottom, and reorder the other two.
Andrea C. R..flavorText: Andrea is often found surrounded by budgies and chickens. You could say she's a bird whisperer.

Angel.abilityDescription: Give all your active and benched characters Goon status. Remove all tools from opposing characters.

Anna Brown.atk1Description:
30
Roll a D6. Deal +(10x value on the die).
Anna Brown.abilityDescription: While Benched: This character does not take damage from your opponent's attacks.
Anna Brown.flavorText: Powered by energy drinks and sawdust from the BDW, Anna can frequently be found staying up late in the SciLi... or sleeping there.

Annotated Score.abilityDescription: Opponent reveals their entire hand and you choose one card to discard. Choose a different card from their discard pile to return to their hand. (They must have a card in discard to play this)

Antong Chen.atk1Description: Can only be used if this character did not use Power Chord last turn. Flip 5 coins; +20 damage for each heads.
Antong Chen.flavorText: Antong channels his Lucky Star-inspired moe by donning his possessions with otaku stickers.

Ashley Toby.abilityDescription: If both benches are full, this character does +40 damage.
Ashley Toby.flavorText: It is said that Ash expresses herself with the mpreg emoji. When not watching Alien Stage, she displays a fixation on seals, prioritizing them over all else.

AVGE Birb.abilityDescription: Remove all tool cards and status effects from your opponent's active and benched characters. During your next turn, your active character takes +20 damage from the first attack.

AVGE Showcase Sticker.abilityDescription: If attached character is active at the start of your turn, flip a coin. If heads, draw 1 extra card.

BAI Email.abilityDescription: Discard any stadium in play. Then, search for a Stadium and put it in your hand. Neither player can play a stadium until the end of your next turn.

Barron Lee.atk1Description:
20
Move your energy among your characters any way you want.
Barron Lee.abilityDescription: Opposing characters cannot have >3 energy attached. When first played, remove all existing excess energy from each.
Barron Lee.flavorText: Barron "The Rock" Lee is blunt, like the rocks he collects.

Ben Cherek III.atk1Description:
50
Each of your Benched Guitar type characters take 10 damage.
Ben Cherek III.abilityDescription: When you play this character from your hand to your bench, you may switch him into your Active slot for free.
Ben Cherek III.flavorText: Ben brings all the mischief and whimsy of being THE Florida man: he survived a category 5 hurricane, he was threatened at knifepoint in an attempted robbery outside V-Dub...

Betty Solomon.atk1Description: Search for any character card and put it on the top of your deck.
Betty Solomon.atk2Description: Flip two coins. If both heads, 50 damage to each character on opponent's Bench. If both tails, 100 damage.
Betty Solomon.flavorText: Betty loves talking to everyone, from Jesus to complete strangers, as seen through her many outreach and mentorship roles over the years.

Bokai Bi.atk1Description: Roll a d6. If you roll a 4 or less, do 60 damage.
Bokai Bi.abilityDescription: If your opponent plays a card you have in your hand, you may reveal it for 20 damage.
Bokai Bi.flavorText: Have you ever heard of Touhou Project?

Bucket.abilityDescription: Attached character becomes a Percussion type.

BUO Stand.abilityDescription: On their first attack,  your active character does +20 damage this turn. Discard 1 energy from the active character.

Camera.abilityDescription: Shuffle one Supporter or Stadium from your discard pile into your deck.

Carolyn Zheng.abilityDescription: If this character did not attack last turn, +30 damage.
Carolyn Zheng.flavorText: Carolyn puts off writing for the Seabird Writing Conference by writing angsty fanfic instead.

Cast Reserve.abilityDescription: Search for three unique items from your deck and reveal them. Your opponent chooses two to shuffle back into your deck. Put the other in your hand.

Cathy Rong.atk1Description:
20
Discard an energy from one of your opponent's benched characters.
Cathy Rong.atk2Description:
50
+30 damage if you have another piano on your bench.
Cathy Rong.flavorText:
CATHY:
"She should have died hereafter;
There would have been a time for such a word.
Tomorrow, and tomorrow, and tomorrow..."

Cavin Xue.abilityName: Wait no... I'm not into femboys-: Cavin deals +20 damage for each maid in play (excluding himself)
Cavin Xue.flavorText: Fueled by a diet of arugula, hojicha, and desserts, Cavin abandoned playing violin in BUO to pursue 100% completion of his next Zelda game.

Christmas Kim.atk2Description: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Reveal all Guitar type character cards, put them in your hand, and do 20 damage for each. Put the rest back in any order.
Christmas Kim.flavorText: Christmas missed the North Pole so much after coming to Providence that she joined the Poler Bears to make up for it.

Coco Zeng.atk1Description:
50
You cannot use this attack next turn.
Coco Zeng.atk2Description: Flip a coin for each card in your hand. For each heads, +30 damage.
Coco Zeng.flavorText: Coco loves cubes, making the Lindemann her perfect home. She can even practice her opera piano transcriptions there!

Concert Program.abilityDescription: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may choose one character you find there, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterwards.

Concert Roster.abilityDescription: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may choose one tool or stadium you find there, reveal it, and put it in your hand.

Concert Ticket.abilityDescription: Draw cards until you have 3 cards in hand. You may not play this if it is the only card in your hand.

Corrupted Musescore File.abilityDescription: Discard a tool from one of your characters. Search for any item card in your deck and put it in your hand.

Daniel Yang.atk1Description:
50
If you have 3 Piano type characters on your bench, deal 30 damage to each of your opponent's benched characters.
Daniel Yang.abilityDescription: If there are no Brass characters in play, this character's attacks deal +10 damage.
Daniel Yang.flavorText: Not much is known about Daniel other than his love for breathing and Wisconsin, and his weakness to French horns and cheese.

Daniel Zhu.atk1Description:
30
Roll a D6. Deal +(10x value on the die).
Daniel Zhu.abilityDescription: When your other characters take damage, you may inflict up to 30 damage onto this character instead. You may not self-KO with this.
Daniel Zhu.flavorText: Daniel once broke his foot tripping over a parking bumper. Thankfully, he's a premed AND a CS concurrent master's student, so he wrote an algorithm to fix it.

David Man.atk1Description: Attack thrice. Each attack deals 20 damage.
David Man.abilityDescription: Once per turn, you may randomly choose and look at a card from your discard pile, if you do, shuffle it into your deck.
David Man.flavorText: See you between the whispers of the wind

Demi Lu.atk1Description:
50
+30 damage if you have another piano on your bench.
Demi Lu.abilityDescription:
While Benched: If the stadium is in Steinert, she is immune to all attacks.
While Active: She is not affected by 15 Minute Walk.
Demi Lu.flavorText: Demi lives by the three principles of life: doomscrolling, bedrotting, and reading fanfiction. Legends say she's even done all three in Steinert.

Desmond Roper.atk1Description:
10
Deal +10 damage for every consecutive use, up to +40.
Desmond Roper.atk2Description:
40
If this character was played to Active this turn, deal +60 damage.
Desmond Roper.flavorText: Challenge Desmond in Geoguessr and you will probably regret it for the rest of your life.

Dress Rehearsal Roster.abilityDescription: Discard 1 energy from your characters in play. Shuffle 3 random cards from your discard into your deck.

Edward Wibowo.atk1Description: Flip a coin for each (X) attached to your opponent's active character. For each heads, remove one (X).
Edward Wibowo.atk2Description:
40
Next turn, your Guitar type characters deal +40 damage.
Edward Wibowo.flavorText: Never ask Edward to choose between Chipotle and Laufey.

Emily Wang.atk1Description: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, one attack of 40 damage.
Emily Wang.abilityDescription: Once during your turn, you may discard a tool from this character to draw a card.
Emily Wang.flavorText: Emily, the founder of the #spotted channel, was also ironically AVGE's most spotted member from 2024-25.

Emma.abilityDescription: Switch your opponent's active character with a benched character of your choice. That character may not retreat during the next turn.

Eugenia Ampofo.atk1Description:
20
You may swap with a Benched character for free.
Eugenia Ampofo.abilityDescription: While Active: You may attach one (X) to two different characters per turn.
Eugenia Ampofo.flavorText: If you can speak Asante Twi with her, Eugenia might give you some extra pointers on your BIOL2555 homework.

Evelyn Wu.atk1Description:
10
Deal +10 damage for every consecutive use, up to +40.
Evelyn Wu.atk2Description: Transfer all existing damage from opponent's Bench to their Active character.
Evelyn Wu.flavorText: Evelyn, the Small Ensemble Committee Lord, runs the committee with an iron fist. Just don't tell the general public what its internal nickname is...

Felix Chen.atk1Description: Flip two coins. If both heads, 50 damage to each character on opponent's Bench. If both tails, 100 damage.
Felix Chen.abilityDescription: If all your characters in play are a different Type, they take -10 damage from attacks.
Felix Chen.flavorText: Felix's COVID hobby involved going viral as a Genshin Impact/Danganronpa voice impressionist. Talk about an internet footprint...

Filip Kaminski.atk1Description: Name a card, then draw the top card of your deck. If the two are the same, 50 damage.
Filip Kaminski.atk2Description:
50
If the current stadium in play was placed by you, do 20 damage to each opposing benched character.
Filip Kaminski.flavorText: Filip simply requests four minutes of your time.

Fiona Li.abilityDescription: While Benched: Your Active character has Maid status.
Fiona Li.flavorText: Fiona's staggering fundraising capabilities are fueled by her desire to gamble in every raffle she comes across.

Folding Stand.abilityDescription: On their first attack, your active character does +10 damage this turn.

Friedman Hall.abilityDescription: Draw two cards per turn. Your opponent chooses one for you to keep; shuffle the other back into your deck.

Gabriel Chen.atk1Description:
Harmonics
Flip two coins. If both heads, deal 60 damage to three opposing characters, or 70 damage to two opposing characters.
Gabriel Chen.abilityDescription: The first time each game this character has 60 health or less, you may instantly deal 70 damage to one random opposing character.
Gabriel Chen.flavorText: Legend says that adding 48 and 19 will summon Gabe instantly, even from miles away.

Grace Zhao.atk1Description:
50
Each of your Benched Guitar type characters take 10 damage.
Grace Zhao.abilityDescription: At the end of your turn, you may deal 10 damage to one opposing character with a Maid Outfit, AVGE Showcase Sticker, or AVGE T-Shirt attached.
Grace Zhao.flavorText: To cope with not yet being Connor's wife from Detroit: Become Human, Grace has become the go-to expert on Chinese brainrot.

Hanlei Gao.atk1Description:
20
You may swap with a Benched character for free.
Hanlei Gao.atk2Description: Each opposing character in play with a tool attached to it takes 50 damage. Opponent returns all tools in play to their hand.
Hanlei Gao.flavorText: Hanlei, AVGE's Rhythm Game Champion, mostly speedruns Minecraft nowadays, but apparently he can still full combo 7* maps on a good day...

Happy Ruth Jara.atk1Description:
30
Flip 2 coins. If both are heads, +40 damage.
Happy Ruth Jara.abilityDescription: While Benched: If you did not play this character from your hand this turn and she has no tools attached, you may move her to your hand.
Happy Ruth Jara.flavorText: Happy exists only in three places: the education department building, Ten One, and rehearsal.

Harper Aitken.atk2Description: Deal 80 damage to two different characters in play. This character takes 80 damage.
Harper Aitken.flavorText: When he's not bodying a Friendly's Wattamelon Roll, you can probably find Harper breakdancing on the green in his hand-painted, nature-themed hoodies.

Henry Wang.atk1Description:
50
You cannot use this attack next turn.
Henry Wang.atk2Description:
10
Discard the top card of your opponent's deck. Deal +90 damage if it is an item.
Henry Wang.flavorText: By day, Henry serves as beloved AVGE Concert Media director and diligent BMC Co-president. By night, a jazz piano legend who can improv on anything.

Ice Skates.abilityDescription: Switch your active character with one of your benched characters.

Ina Ma.atk1Description: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, one attack of 40 damage.
Ina Ma.abilityDescription: Once per turn, you may move 1 (X) from one of your Strings type characters to this character.
Ina Ma.flavorText: A lover of crabs and Ratty peas, Ina is also definitely not a furry. She's not. It's just a bit. Promise.

Iris Yang.atk1Description:
10
Draw a card. If it is an item, you must immediately use it.
Iris Yang.atk2Description:
30
You may switch your opponent's Active character with one of their Benched characters.
Iris Yang.flavorText: Ni ke neng cai bu dao, dan an ran qi hui shuo ying yu!

Izzy Chen.abilityDescription: You may flip a coin once per turn. If heads, shuffle a stadium card from your discard pile into your deck.
Izzy Chen.flavorText: Izzy's power level increases proportional to the number of emails BAI sends each semester.

Jayden Brown.atk1Description:
30
Roll a D6. Deal +(10x the result) damage.
Jayden Brown.abilityDescription: While Active: The first time you flip a coin each turn, you may treat it as heads.
Jayden Brown.flavorText: An avid fan of Magic: The Gathering, Jayden has found over 1000 four-leaf clovers in his life. One could say he has magic... for gathering.

Jennie Wang.atk1Description: Deal 10 damage to each opposing character per other SE Committee member in play, up to 30 damage each.
Jennie Wang.atk2Description:
60
+20 damage if the stadium in play is a performance hall.
Jennie Wang.flavorText: Jennie has trained for years in the Barbour basement, ready to go to war for her Hetalia faves via ping-pong tournaments.

Jessica Jung.abilityDescription: You may flip a coin once per turn. If heads, shuffle a supporter card from your discard pile into your deck.
Jessica Jung.flavorText: Jessica was once circled by a bear while camping with her family. Luckily for them, she's an assistant instructor in Brown Taekwondo!

Johann.abilityDescription: Choose up to one Supporter, one Item or Tool, and one Stadium card from your discard pile and put them into your hand. Your turn ends.

Jordan Roosevelt.atk1Description: Opponent's attacks do +20 damage their next turn. Jordan's attacks do +60 damage your next turn.
Jordan Roosevelt.flavorText: A lifeguard, water polo player, and avid water sports lover, Jordan is essentially a fish.

Joshua Kou.atk1Description: If you used this move last turn, deal 40 damage.
Joshua Kou.abilityDescription: If you play this character from your hand to your bench, you may draw cards until you have 4 cards in your hand.
Joshua Kou.flavorText: To destress from his intense rounds of Battle Cats, Joshua enjoys thinking about category theory and writing BRUMO problems.

Juan Burgos.atk1Description:
30
+20 damage per Brass type character on your bench.
Juan Burgos.abilityDescription: While Benched: Your Brass type characters deal +10 damage.
Juan Burgos.flavorText: Even though he's been stung by a jellyfish (ow), Juan still loves going to the zoo!

Julia Ceccarelli.atk1Description: Look at your opponent's hand. You may choose an Item there and use its effects as this attack.
Julia Ceccarelli.atk2Description:
50
If you knock out a character using this attack, do 30 damage to each remaining opposing character.
Julia Ceccarelli.flavorText: An animal-lover at heart, Julia can be found searching for rabbits around campus when she takes a rare break from her thesis in the Brown Dog Lab.

Kana Takizawa.atk1Description: Roll a 6 sided die until you get two consecutive numbers that add to 7. For each roll, do a separate attack of 10 damage.
Kana Takizawa.abilityDescription: Take -10 damage from each attack, calculated after all modifiers.
Kana Takizawa.flavorText: Osoraku yosou mo shinai kamoshiremasen ga, Kana-san wa Nihongo wo hanasemasu!

Kathy Sun.atk1Description: Reveal your opponent's hand. They choose two cards to shuffle back into their deck.
Kathy Sun.atk2Description: Roll a 6 sided die until you get two consecutive numbers that add to 7. For each roll, do a separate attack of 10 damage.
Kathy Sun.flavorText: Often found scouring Pinterest for cold dukes of the north, Kathy was also born on 6/7. Is it a divine sign?

Katie Xiang.atk1Description:
20
At the end of your opponent's next turn, 30 damage.
Katie Xiang.abilityDescription: At the end of your turn, if this character has under 50 health, heal 20 damage from all your characters.
Katie Xiang.flavorText: Stories say Katie has a soft spot for emotional piano arrangements, the color purple, and kidnapping Mason.

Kei Watanabe.atk1Description: 10 damage to one of your opponent's characters of your choice.
Kei Watanabe.atk2Description: Choose an attack of any of your Percussion type characters in play to use as this attack. Then, move all energy from this character to the character whose attack you used.
Kei Watanabe.flavorText: Sustained by brisket, strawberry milk, and the energy of his twin brother, Kei's arranging prowess is only matched by his Vocaloid ball knowledge.

Kevin Yang.atk1Description: Roll a d6. If you roll 4 or less, do 60 damage.
Kevin Yang.atk2Description: Roll a d6 four times. Deal (40x the single lowest die you rolled) damage.
Kevin Yang.flavorText: Kevin loves randomness, especially when gazing out at the stars. Or when getting his medical test results back.

Kiki's Headband.abilityDescription: Retreat cost is reduced by 1 energy.

Lindemann Practice Room.abilityDescription: If all of your benched characters share a type with your active character, your attacks take 1 less energy.

Lio.abilityDescription: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw 4 cards.

Loang Chiang.atk1Description:
20
You may swap with a Benched character for free.
Loang Chiang.atk2Description: Your characters in play heal 30 damage. Remove 1 energy from this character.
Loang Chiang.flavorText: Loang has been advocating for AVGE speed dating for years on end. Who knows if she'll ever find her match?

Luca Chen.atk2Description:
40
If no other WW characters are in play, deal +50 damage.
Luca Chen.flavorText: As a consequence for being one of the rare people in AVGE who enjoys touching grass, Luca once almost got run over by a Pepsi truck.

Lucas.abilityDescription: Search for and reveal up to two characters of different types that share no types with your board. Put one on the top of your deck and the other in your hand.

Luke Xu.atk1Description:
20
Damage of your opponent's next attack is halved (rounded up)
Luke Xu.abilityDescription: If you switched or played him to your active slot, your opponents' abilities have no effect for the rest of your turn.
Luke Xu.flavorText: Luke loves both Natsuiro Matsuri and orange-vanilla flavoring. I'm sensing a theme here...

Maggie Li.abilityDescription: At the beginning of your turn, you may heal 10 damage from this character.
Maggie Li.flavorText: Maggie's red Uniqlo scarf is so comfy, it puts its wearer to sleep immediately. When not sleeping, she moonlights as Lion Dance's social media chair.

Maid Outfit.abilityDescription: Attached character gains Maid status while holding this tool.

Main Hall.abilityDescription: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played. May not be played on the first turn.

Mason Yu.atk1Description: Give one benched character arranger status.
Mason Yu.atk2Description: Discard an energy from this card. Then, choose any two characters in play. Randomly select one of them; that character moves to their side's active slot, and choose an attack from the other character to use as this attack.
Mason Yu.flavorText: It is said that Mason praises the diabolical, often in the form of arrangements, card game strategies, and sleep schedules...

Matthew Wang.abilityDescription: While Active: At the start of your turn, flip a coin. If heads, you may draw two cards instead of one.
Matthew Wang.flavorText: Matthew nearly became a niche YouTube video documentary when he almost drowned doing Batman & Joker RP with his brother in an inflatable kiddie pool.

Meiyi Song.atk1Description: 10 damage. You may put an Item card you played this turn into your hand.
Meiyi Song.atk2Description:
20
If no other WW characters are in play, deal +50 damage.
Meiyi Song.flavorText: Meiyi hunts for the Andrews bun noodle bowl like Quanxi hunts for Devils.

Meya Gao.atk1Description:
40
Next turn, your Guitar type characters deal +40 damage.
Meya Gao.abilityDescription: While Active: If any character deals damage to this character, both characters cannot attack during the next turn.
Meya Gao.flavorText: Meya has a lot of complex interests: JoJo, tomatoes, sheep, woodwork... if you want, she can break it down for you.

Michael Tu.atk1Description: Reveal cards from your deck until a character card is revealed. If that character is not a String type, deal 30 damage, and put the character in your hand. Shuffle your deck afterwards.
Michael Tu.atk2Description:
60
+20 damage if the stadium in play is a performance hall.
Michael Tu.flavorText: Michael ran the Providence half-marathon in 2025 to destress from his role as the lower strings section leader.

Michelle.abilityDescription: Opponent discards down to 1 card in hand. Cannot be played on the first turn.

Michelle Kim.atk1Description:
10
Draw a card. If it is an item, you must immediately use it.
Michelle Kim.atk2Description:
30
If Miku Otamatone was used this turn, +50 damage.
Michelle Kim.flavorText: On the rare occasion that you do not find Michelle at a maimai machine, she may be dressed as Cooking Mama, baking a delicious apple pie.

Miku Otamatone.abilityDescription: You can only play this card in performance halls. During this turn only, your active character has two additional energy attached. Cannot be played on the first turn.

Otamatone.abilityDescription: During this turn only, your active character has one additional energy attached. Cannot be played on the first turn.

Owen Landry.atk1Description:
50
Each of your Benched Guitar type characters take 10 damage.
Owen Landry.atk2Description: Remove all energy attached to this character. Deal 50 damage to all opposing characters in play.
Owen Landry.flavorText: Owen studies biomedical engineering in pursuit of recreating Cursed Techniques in the real world.

Pascal Kim.atk1Description:
20
When at 50 health or below, deal +30 damage. When at 20 health or below, deal +70 damage instead.
Pascal Kim.atk2Description: Shuffle this character and all tools attached to it into your deck. At the end of your opponent's next turn, 70 damage.

Petteruti Lounge.abilityDescription:
Maids do +10 damage and have -1 retreat cost. Matcha heals +10 additional health.
Powerpoint Night: For each attack a player does, they may choose a random card to look at from their opponent's hand.

Printed Score.abilityDescription: Opponent reveals their entire hand and chooses one card to discard. Cannot be played on the first turn.

Rachael Yuan.atk1Description:
10
Deal +10 damage for every consecutive use, up to +40.
Rachael Yuan.atk2Description: If your opponent's Bench has 2+ characters, you may shuffle one opposing Benched character back into their deck.
Rachael Yuan.flavorText: Not many pre-meds can be like Rachael and grow bioluminescent algae in their closet...

Rachel Chen.atk1Description: For each of your Choir type characters in play, deal 20 damage to one opposing character.
Rachel Chen.abilityDescription: Once per turn, you may retrieve a Concert Program, Concert Roster, or Concert Ticket from your discard pile and place it on the top of your deck.
Rachel Chen.flavorText: Count on Rachel to turn a throwaway idea into a dramatic 10 page comic.

Raffle Ticket.abilityDescription: Draw a card from the bottom of your deck. If it is an AVGE Birb, heal all damage from one character.

Red Room.abilityDescription: Amp Diff: Strings, woodwinds and brass do -10 damage; choir, guitars, percussion, pianos do +10 damage.

Richard.abilityDescription: Shuffle both your discard pile and your deck, and switch them.

Riley Hall.abilityDescription: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of a player's turn, each of their characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.

Roberto Gonzales.atk1Description:
30
Remove all (X) attached to this character. For each, burn 1 card from the top of your opponent's deck.
Roberto Gonzales.atk2Description:
40
Next turn, your Guitar type characters deal +40 damage.
Roberto Gonzales.flavorText: Roberto legendarily founded the Adobe Video Game Ensemble. Luckily for us, Adobe hasn't taken the copyright issue to court... yet.

Ross Williams.atk1Description: If Ross is on your bench, choose a card from your discard pile to put in your hand. If he is on your opponent's bench, deal 20 damage to one opposing character. If he is on both benches, nothing happens.
Ross Williams.abilityDescription: While Benched: Both active characters can use Ross's attacks.

Ryan Du.atk1Description: Remove all (X) attached to this character. For each, +30 damage.
Ryan Du.atk2Description:
20
Deal +10 damage per Benched character you have.
Ryan Du.flavorText: No one knows how Ryan keeps track of all the deals around Providence. Maybe this foresight is also how he got 3 songs into Large Ensemble in 1 semester.

Ryan Lee.atk1Description: Attach up to two energy to one of your benched Percussion types.
Ryan Lee.atk2Description: Attack four times. Each attack deals 10 damage. Draw a card.
Ryan Lee.flavorText: Some say that Ryan has visited every cafe in Tokyo in search of the best matcha powder, in hopes of starting his own matcha maid cafe.

Ryan Li.atk1Description:
50
+30 damage if you have another piano on your bench.
Ryan Li.abilityDescription: All maids (on your side) do +10 damage.
Ryan Li.flavorText: A big fan of stimming and skateboarding, sometimes simultaneously, Ryan is excellent at following directions as told. Unless he's told to not crash the cymbals in public spaces.

Salomon DECI.abilityDescription: For every guitar, piano, choir or percussion attack, roll a d6. On 3-6: -30 damage.

Sarah Chen.atk1Description: Attack twice. Each attack deals 10 damage.
Sarah Chen.atk2Description: Discard any number of Concert Programs, Concert Rosters, or Concert Tickets. For each, deal 40 damage to one opposing character.
Sarah Chen.flavorText: Rumor has it that all of the profit Sarah has made from selling her art has gone straight into her noodle fund.

Sas Majumder.atk1Description: Attack four times. Each attack deals 10 damage. Draw a card.
Sas Majumder.abilityDescription: During your opponent's turn, for the first card that enters your discard pile, you may put it back on the top of your deck.

Sophia S. Wang.atk1Description:
20
Damage of your opponent's next attack is halved (rounded up)
Sophia S. Wang.abilityDescription: The first time each turn you attach an energy to this character, your opponent must discard the top card of their deck.
Sophia S. Wang.flavorText: Is the "original Sophia Wang" the arranger Sophia Wang or the pianist Sophia Wang? To make things even more confusing, they happen to be in the same small ensemble...

Sophia Y. Wang.atk1Description: You may draw cards, taking 20 Fixed damage for each card drawn (you may not self-KO). If you get AVGE Birb, stop and heal all damage from this character. If you stop otherwise, shuffle drawn cards into your deck.
Sophia Y. Wang.atk2Description:
50
If you knock out a character using this attack, do 30 damage to your opponent's Benched characters.
Sophia Y. Wang.flavorText: Sophia loves gambling, as shown by her (how many hours?) on the Hoyoverse. According to her, Hoyofatigue is a myth.

Standard Musescore File.abilityDescription: Discard a tool from one of your characters. Search for any non-item card in your deck and put it in your hand.

Steinert Basement.abilityDescription:
Duo Queue: If you have exactly two character cards in play at the start of your turn, draw two cards instead of one.
15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

Steinert Practice Room.abilityDescription:
Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first).
15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

Strawberry Matcha Latte.abilityDescription: One character of your choice heals 20 health.

Victoria.abilityDescription: Choose a type. Search for and reveal up two characters of that type in your deck. Put one on the top of your deck and the other in your hand.

Video Camera.abilityDescription: Move an Item from your discard pile to the top of your deck.

Vincent Chen.atk2Description:
40
Heal one benched character for the same amount of damage this attack dealt.
Vincent Chen.flavorText: Glory to big stall. Unless Vincent's the one facing it.

Weston Poe.abilityDescription: If this character loses 60+ health from an attack, deal damage back equal to health lost.
Weston Poe.flavorText: A top 0.1% listener of Charli XCX, it is said that Weston's brat summers are also brat falls and winters.

Will.abilityDescription: Shuffle all items from your discard pile into your deck.

Yanwan Zhu.atk1Description:
60
Your opponent's Benched characters take 10 damage.
Yanwan Zhu.abilityDescription: While Active: At the start of your turn, if she has exactly 2 (X) attached, you may heal 30 damage from a different character.
Yanwan Zhu.flavorText: Yanwan is the "most normal" member of the Arknights server, but it's unclear if that really means anything, given, you know, the Arknights server...

Yuelin Hu.atk1Description: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, one attack of 40 damage.
Yuelin Hu.abilityDescription: Whenever you draw an AVGE birb, you may discard it to deal 20 damage.
Yuelin Hu.flavorText: Yuelin spends so much time thinking about cats that she once forgot what a swan looks like. She thought it was a goose.
